rules.name: Sent only to me (sole recipient)
rules.description: I am the only person in To — no CC, no other recipients

rules.name: @mention of my name in body
rules.description: @MyName appears somewhere in the email body

rules.name: My email is in the To field
rules.description: I am a direct To recipient (may have others)

rules.name: Has attachments
rules.description: Email contains one or more attachments

rules.name: I am CC'd only (not in To)
rules.description: I'm in CC but not a primary To recipient
